description: Vibrant hand-sewn crossbody tote featuring bold blue, red, white, and yellow striped patterns—perfect for day trips or everyday errands. The lightweight design and adjustable black strap make it a fun, eco-friendly accessory for all ages.
fabric: Upcycled handwoven cotton blend with sturdy black nylon webbing strap

description: Handcrafted crossbody bag showcasing a bold chevron zigzag pattern in vivid rainbow hues on a deep navy base. Features a sleek black adjustable strap and subtle metal emblem detail—perfect for adding a pop of color to any outfit, day or night.
fabric: Upcycled wool-blend textile with sturdy black nylon webbing strap and metal accent

description: Artisan shoulder bag with vivid blue, red and white handwoven stripes, finished with a charming wooden button loop closure. The adjustable black nylon strap makes it a versatile, eco-friendly companion for market runs or weekend strolls.
fabric: Upcycled handwoven cotton with sturdy black nylon webbing strap and natural wood button

description: Chic handmade shoulder bag adorned with vibrant red floral motifs on a deep black background. Features a tasteful V-shaped navy trim and classic black button closure—ideal for both casual outings and dressier occasions.
fabric: Upcycled cotton print with durable black nylon strap and button detail
